2603.17433.title: The Phasor Transformer: Resolving Attention Bottlenecks on the Unit Circle
2603.17433.paper_summary: Transformer models have redefined sequence learning, yet dot-product self-attention introduces a quadratic token-mixing bottleneck for long-context time-series. We introduce the \textbf{Phasor Transformer} block, a phase-native alternative representing sequence states on the unit-circle manifold $S^1$. Each block combines lightweight trainable phase-shifts with parameter-free Discrete Fourier Transform (DFT) token coupling, achieving global $\mathcal{O}(N\log N)$ mixing without explicit attention maps. Stacking these blocks defines the \textbf{Large Phasor Model (LPM)}. We validate LPM on autoregressive time-series prediction over synthetic multi-frequency benchmarks. Operating with a highly compact parameter budget, LPM learns stable global dynamics and achieves competitive forecasting behavior compared to conventional self-attention baselines. Our results establish an explicit efficiency-performance frontier, demonstrating that large-model scaling for time-series can emerge from geometry-constrained phase computation with deterministic global coupling, offering a practical path toward scalable temporal modeling in oscillatory domains.
2603.17433.paper_summary_zh: Transformer 模型重新定義了序列學習，然而點積自注意力為長上下文時間序列引入了二次令牌混合瓶頸。我們提出了 \textbf{Phasor Transformer} 區塊，這是一種原生相位替代方案，將序列狀態表示在單位圓流形 $S^1$ 上。每個區塊結合了輕量級可訓練的相位移動與無參數的離散傅立葉變換 (DFT) 令牌耦合，實現全球 $\mathcal{O}(N\log N)$ 的混合，而無需明確的注意力圖。堆疊這些區塊定義了 \textbf{Large Phasor Model (LPM)}。我們在合成多頻基準上驗證 LPM 的自回歸時間序列預測。在高度緊湊的參數預算下，LPM 學會了穩定的全球動態，並與傳統自注意力基準相比實現了具有競爭力的預測行為。我們的結果建立了一個明確的效率-性能邊界，展示了時間序列的大模型擴展可以從幾何約束的相位計算和確定性全球耦合中出現，為在振盪領域中可擴展的時間建模提供了一條實際的途徑。
2603.17433.author: Dibakar Sigdel et.al.
